app.title: Local, CPU-Friendly, High-Quality TTS (Text-to-Speech) with Kokoro
app.author: speckx
proposed_tests: Install Kokoro, generate 1000 text-to-speech pairs, measure latency
Run Kokoro on a low-end CPU, check performance vs high-end CPU
Compare voice quality using subjective evaluation metric
